_comment: Schema for comms/follow_ups.json — the layer-2 review's running list of unresolved items. Read by .claude/skills/health-review/SKILL.md alongside artifacts/health/latest.json. Each entry tracks something a prior review surfaced that wasn't fully resolved at the time, with a trigger condition the next /health-review run must evaluate. This file is documentation only — it is not validated as a JSON Schema.

follow_ups.title: ≤ 80 chars
follow_ups.description: ≤ 600 chars — what was observed, what's unknown, and why the original reviewer didn't fully resolve it.
follow_ups.expected_check: ≤ 400 chars — the concrete evaluation the next /health-review run must perform against its diag/audit data.
follow_ups.trigger_condition: ≤ 200 chars — when this follow-up applies (e.g. 'any /health-review run', 'when bybit_2 has a rejection in window').
